---
title: "Clean and Combine Archive Data"
output: html_notebook
---

## Libraries

```{r}
library(googlesheets4)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Sheets Connection

```{r}
gs4_auth(email = "")
```


## Season 14

```{r warning=FALSE}
sheet_id_14 = "1m45w0hQOkvUFvNpc5MwQcN4snGs0Lkrb6kJfOUJf6tw"

#Share Numbers tab
sn = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'share_numbers'
                ,col_types = 'icccicD-'
)

#Farmer Produce tab
fp = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'farm_produce'
                ,skip = 1
                ,col_types = 'icccnnnnncD'
)

#Weekly Share Lists tab
wsl = range_read(sheet_id_14
                 ,sheet = 'weekly_share_lists'
                 ,col_types = 'iccicin--D'
)

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
is = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'inv_sales'
                ,col_types = 'iccnnccD--'
)

#Master Item List tab
mil = range_read(sheet_id_14
                 ,sheet = 'master_item_list'
                 ,col_types = 'cccccccnccD'
)

#Share List tab
################

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
sr = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'share_rotation'
                ,col_types = '----Dicic----------'
)

#Farmer List tab
################

#Produce Per List tab
################

rm(sheet_id_14)

```

## Season 15

```{r}
sheet_id_15 = ""

rm(sheet_id_15)
```

## Combine Data

```{r}
#Share Numbers tab
c_sn = sn %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14')

#Farmer Produce tab
c_fp = fp %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14')

#Weekly Share Lists tab
c_wsl = wsl %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14')

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
c_is = is %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14')

#Master Item List tab
c_mil = mil %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14')

#Share List tab
################

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
c_sr = sr %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14')

#Farmer List tab
################

#Produce Per List tab
################
```

## Clean Data

```{r}
#Share Numbers tab
cc_sn = c_sn %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .)))

#Farmer Produce tab
cc_fp_v1 = c_fp %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  mutate(av_min = ifelse(is.na(av_min), 0, av_min)
         ,av_max = ifelse(is.na(av_max), 0, av_max)
         ,order = ifelse(is.na(order), 0, order)
         ,store = ifelse(is.na(store), 0, store)
         ,store_note = ifelse(is.na(store_note), '', store_note)) %>% 
  mutate(clean = ifelse(av_min > 0 | av_max > 0 | order > 0 | store > 0 | store_note != '', 1, 0)) 

stopifnot(cc_fp_v1 %>% filter(is.na(clean)) %>% summarise(n = n()) %>% pull == 0)

cc_fp = cc_fp_v1 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(item)) %>% 
  filter(clean == 1) %>% 
  select(-clean) %>% 
  mutate(store_note = ifelse(store_note == '', NA, store_note))

#Weekly Share Lists tab
cc_wsl = c_wsl %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(item) & !is.na(week) & !is.na(item_nu))

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
cc_is_v1 = c_is %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  rename(invent_manual = invent._manual) %>% 
  mutate(invent_from_farmigo = ifelse(is.na(invent_from_farmigo), 0, invent_from_farmigo)
         ,invent_manual = ifelse(is.na(invent_manual), 0, invent_manual)
         ,clean = ifelse(invent_from_farmigo > 0 | invent_manual > 0 | !is.na(inventory_note) | !is.na(sold), 1, 0) 
         )

stopifnot(cc_is_v1 %>% filter(is.na(clean)) %>% summarise(n = n()) %>% pull == 0)

cc_is = cc_is_v1 %>% 
  filter(clean == 1) %>% 
  select(-clean)

#Master Item List tab
cc_mil = c_mil %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(category) | !is.na(type) | !is.na(preferred_per_value))

#Share List tab
################

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
cc_sr = c_sr %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  rename(week = 'week_#') 

#Farmer List tab
################

#Produce Per List tab
################
```

## Add New Columns

```{r}
#Share Numbers tab
ccc_sn = cc_sn %>% 
  left_join(cc_sr %>% 
              select(season, week, date) %>% 
              distinct()
            , by = c('season','week'))

#Farmer Produce tab
ccc_fp = cc_fp %>% 
  left_join(cc_sr %>% 
              select(season, week, date) %>% 
              distinct()
            , by = c('season','week'))

#Weekly Share Lists tab
ccc_wsl = cc_wsl %>% 
  left_join(cc_sr %>% 
              select(season, week, date) %>% 
              distinct()
            , by = c('season','week'))

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
ccc_is = cc_is  %>% 
  left_join(cc_sr %>% 
              select(season, week, date) %>% 
              distinct()
            , by = c('season','week'))

#Master Item List tab
ccc_mil = cc_mil

#Share List tab
################

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
ccc_sr = cc_sr

#Farmer List tab
################

#Produce Per List tab
################
```

## Upload Data to Google Sheets

```{r}
sheet_id_ccc = "1xs8TAMrSsJuL_gou4y0DBH3IkaTH0eBn_pdboCGWFTI"

#Share Numbers tab
sheet_write(ccc_sn, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "share_numbers")

#Farmer Produce tab
sheet_write(ccc_fp, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "farm_produce")

#Weekly Share Lists tab
sheet_write(ccc_wsl, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "weekly_share_lists")

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
sheet_write(ccc_is, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "inv_sales")

#Master Item List tab
sheet_write(ccc_mil, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "master_item_list")

#Share List tab
################

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
sheet_write(ccc_sr, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "share_rotation")

#Farmer List tab
################

#Produce Per List tab
################
```

## Data Checks

```{r}

```
